text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking around the<n>academy...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Murgh... I just need to calm down<n>and think
clearly. There must be a way<n>to train in both form
and function...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Th-that was close. Half a step later,<n>and I
would've run right into you.
choice_data_list: Be sure to watch where you're going.
Be sure to watch where you're going.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry! Were you hurt? I was<n>so lost in my
thoughts, I didn't realize<n>you were there!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's such a relief! And you're<n>right, I'll
have to take care not to get<n>distracted while
walking around.
choice_data_list: What were you thinking so hard about?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
W-well... I've been trying to figure out<n>what type
of training is best suited to<n>me...
choice_data_list: How about choosing one and sticking to it?
Why not experiment with a bunch of methods?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You're right! Just because you water<n>the ground
diligently doesn't mean<n>seedlings will soon
sprout.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
In other words, "a rose garden isn't<n>built in a
day."

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wow, such words of wisdom! I'll<n>have to write
that one down in my<n>notebook later!
choice_data_list:
(That... sounds an awful lot like another
proverb...)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
All right! The time for indecision is<n>over! I'll
choose a single method and<n>focus all my efforts
on it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! Now that I'm free of<n>distractions, I feel
like I can fully<n>devote myself to training!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I won't ever forget your kindness<n>today. I
promise to pay you back<n>when we meet next!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'll be seeing you, then!<n>Goodbye!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O runs off towards<n>the training
gym.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see. You have a point. I won't<n>know what
method suits me if I don't<n>try different ones.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: The more you sow, the more you<n>grow, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, now those are some wise<n>words! I better
write that down before<n>I forget.
choice_data_list: (Seems more like common sense to me...)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm going to test out all the<n>training
styles I can at school!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, the fog in my mind<n>has lifted! I
can finally see the path<n>forward!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I won't ever forget your kindness<n>today. I
promise to pay you back<n>when we meet next!
choice_data_list: Uh, don't worry about it. It's no big deal.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
No, it's the right thing to do. You really<n>helped me
out!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If you ever need help, please do not<n>hesitate to
ask. It would be my<n>pleasure to aid you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Well, I'm off.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O smiles warmly at<n>me, then
leaves.
